query: motion blur photograph subject in motion long exposure
message: sub:intentional_blur/motion_blur — anti_aesthetic — panning, ICM, streaked moving subjects

response.objective_caption: A bald man stands on a city sidewalk playing an acoustic guitar and singing, positioned against a building wall with a poster display behind him. Three pedestrians pass in front of him: a woman walking, a man in dark clothing, and another man pushing a stroller. The scene takes place on a paved pedestrian street with large shop windows and signage visible in the background. The image is rendered in black and white.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A motion-blurred black and white street scene where a stationary bald man plays acoustic guitar and sings against a building wall, his fixed clarity contrasting with three streaking pedestrians who blur past him in long exposure: a walking woman, a man in dark clothes, and a man with a stroller. The intentional motion blur renders the passersby as ghostly streaks while the musician remains a still point, his expression conveying melancholy or strain as he performs. Pavement, shop windows, and urban signage anchor the documentary-style capture of anonymous city life.
